PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, MARIA T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICOLAI, SOHI CO-EXEC ESTATE OF RAY HILLS DECEASED WEBBER, BILL CO-EXEC ESTATE OF RAY HILLS DECEASED $15,240.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,240.00, THAT PL MARIA T. GONZALES RECOVER FROM THE DF SOHI NICOLAI A ND BILL WEBBER AS C-EXECTORS OF THE ESTATE OF ROY HILLS (DEC EASED) IN THE SUM OF $15,240.00 STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PL MARIA T. GONZALES.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, MARIA T.
